title: Staff Quality Assurance Engineer(QA with AI Expertise)
company_focus: Talent data platform with 3D data and AI
description:
What is Findem:

Findem is the only talent data platform that combines 3D
data with AI. It automates and consolidates top-of-funnel
activities across your entire talent ecosystem, bringing
together sourcing, CRM, and analytics into one place. Only
3D data connects people and company data over time - making
an individual’s entire career instantly accessible in a
single click, removing the guesswork, and unlocking insights
about the market and your competition no one else can.
Powered by 3D data, Findem’s automated workflows across the
talent lifecycle are the ultimate competitive advantage.
Enabling talent teams to deliver continuous pipelines of
top, diverse candidates while creating better talent
experiences, Findem transforms the way companies plan, hire,
and manage talent. Learn more at www.findem.ai

Experience:15Yrs-15+ years of experience in Quality
Assurance / SDET roles with deep expertise in testing,
automation, and modern AI-assisted QA processes.

About the role:

As our products and AI-driven features continue to expand,
we’re looking for a Staff Quality Assurance Engineer to help
us scale QA through AI and automation.

 You’ll play a key role in modernizing our QA ecosystem by
leveraging AI tools, optimizing test coverage, and improving
automation speed and accuracy.

You will collaborate closely with Engineering, PM, and
DevOps teams across the U.S., Canada, and India to ensure
the quality of our growing portfolio of AI-powered products,
including:

AI Assistance in Campaigns (e.g. AI-powered campaign
creation)

AI Assistance in Start Search (Copilot)

AI Assistance in Profile Enrichment

Insights for Profile Enrichment

Auto-suggested Titles

Company List Generation

Responsibilities

- Scale QA operations using AI tools and frameworks
- Use AI technologies to enhance testing coverage and
  automation across multiple teams and locations
- Write, execute, and report comprehensive test plans and test
  cases
- Develop and maintain automated tests for web and backend
  systems
- Accelerate CI/CD automation pipelines and improve test
  coverage analysis
- Identify changes across repositories and commits to help QA
  focus testing efficiently
- Champion best practices for testing, automation, and AI
  integration in QA processes

Skill Requirements

- Hands-on experience with AI-assisted development tools such
  as VS+ Cline, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Codeium, Claude,
  Cursor, or Cody
- Strong understanding of QA automation tools: Playwright,
  Selenium, CI/CD systems (e.g., Jenkins), and issue
  tracking tools like Jira
- Experience using Bitbucket, Git, and browser development
  tools
- Strong coding skills in one or more languages: Typescript,
  Java, Python, or Shell scripting
- Proven ability to integrate AI into QA workflows for test
  generation, coverage analysis, or automation acceleration

Competencies

- Ability to guide and mentor engineers on leveraging AI tools
  in QA and development
- Strong ownership and multitasking skills
- Excellent collaboration with cross-functional teams (PM,
  DevOps, Engineering)
- Ability to design, scope, and manage large-scale test
  strategies

Education

- Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science,
  Engineering, or a related field

The role is full-time and comes with full benefits. We are
globally headquartered in the San Francisco Bay Area with
our India headquarters in Bengaluru.

Equal Opportunity

As an equal opportunity employer, we do not discriminate on
the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, age,
sex (including pregnancy), physical or mental disability,
medical condition, genetic information, gender identity or
expression, sexual orientation, marital status, protected
veteran status or any other legally-protected
characteristic.

use_cases: AI copilot for candidate search functionality
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Quality Assurance Engineer role that uses AI tools
to improve testing processes and automation, but does not
involve building, training, or deploying AI models. The role
focuses on leveraging AI-assisted development tools
(Copilot, ChatGPT, etc.) to enhance QA workflows, test
generation, and automation - supporting the engineering team
rather than working directly on AI systems.
